title: I can't respond to comments anymore if anyone can help

transcript.text: Hello, I wanted to do a YouTube video proving that I cannot comment on people's comments on my video.
Just can't do it, can't figure any way to do it.
The only way I can do it is if I actually click on the video itself.
But I have no way of knowing if there was a comment unless I actually look at my video.
But I have 3,000 videos, so if somebody comments on a video I did a month ago, there's no way I'm ever going to know.
And I'll show you, this is my proof.
Here's my YouTube.
YouTube says, it looks like you have enabled Internet Explorer compatibility view.
So you want to turn off compatibility view.
I don't know why we want to turn it off, you'd think you'd want to have it turned on.
So okay, let's turn off Windows compatibility view so I can respond to comments.
So what you do is you press the alt key.
Bring up tools.
You go on, you hit tools here.
You go down to compatibility view settings.
But there, it's already turned off.
So it's removed, I don't have to remove it.
And I tried it with it added and I tried it with removed.
So that option is out.
So what's another option?
Well I could try to use another browser.
I could try to use Firefox.
And I set my firewall to the default settings.
So I'll just try to get Firefox here.
But Firefox will not, my computer will not allow me to download Firefox.
Because my Mozilla Firefox has been safe, unsafe and has been removed according to Norton.
So maybe I have to turn off the Norton.
So then, option number three would be to go to Google Chrome browser.
Only problem is when I go to Google Chrome browser, I clickety clickety click click clickety click.
And you can see, clickety click click click click, click click click click, nothing.
Nothing ever happens.
And in fact, it never even lives.
It just spins around and spins around forever.
And I can't even scroll it down.
It's stillborn.
My whole, yeah, page unresponsive.
It's just always unresponsive.
So, kill pages.
Alright, fine.
So, what's the, I can't even kill the page.
So, what's the next thing?
Okay, well I guess I can go to my Google Plus, right?
Google Plus.
Okay.
Respond to comments via Google Plus.
Okay, let's do that.
Google Plus.
Alright, okay.
Google Plus.
And, waiting for Google Plus.
Waiting for Google Plus.
And this page cannot be displayed.
So, that's all four of my options have been eliminated.
I do not know what I can do.
I guess the only option I have left is, um, Norton Firewall.
Do I turn off the Norton Firewall?
Do I disable Norton?
Is that what I do?
Yeah, if there's anybody out there who can help me, please help me.
Give me some advice on how I can respond to YouTube comments.
Because that's one of the things about my YouTube channel.
The special things about my YouTube channel.
I'm the guy who responds to all the comments all the time.
And now I can't respond to shit.
Unless it's a video I just uploaded.
So, what's going on here?
Am I getting singled out?
Is this some kind of, uh, you know, I mean, am I the only person who all this shit's happening to?
Or is this happening to everybody and nobody can comment on anymore?
So, please help.
Thank you.
Bye-bye.
